text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins today! I'm eager to begin
training in preparation for the Kikuka Sho, the
last race of the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, after arriving at the lodge, Admire
Vega seems sidetracked with something.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey... You haven't seen Shinko Windy, have you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Really? Ugh... Where did she wander off to?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabeee!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I found Windy! Thanks for your help!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... What're ya looking for me fooor?! Leave
me alone!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Haha, how am I supposed to do that when we're
classmates?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Look, they're doing roll call over there. You only
need to hang around a little longer!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Well... if you say so...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... All right, now that you've found Windy, I'll be—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe! Ticket just found Taishin and is bringing
her back to our class's line.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket found her resting in a corner. She was
feeling sick after getting off the bus and being
surrounded by all the other students. Sorry for all
the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's fine if you found her. That sounds like
everyone, then.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Top Road! I can handle the roll call.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All right... Thanks for the report, Class
Representative.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for leaving you in charge of all these
troublemakers. As your classmate, I should have
helped you with the responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! You're managing the entire student
council, Air Groove. Leave the classes to me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: And actually, I got a lot of help from Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If we don't finish roll call, we can't start getting
ready for training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I knew I could count on you! You're such a
huge help!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. You don't have to say all that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Admire Vega around her classmates,
she seems like a different person from the
taciturn, training-focused Umamusume I'm used
to.
